title: Retroactive spawn-packet — decide-kit consumer SwiftUI library
spawnVariantRationale: Matrix-solver verdict (MULTI between light/medium) → operator-judged lean answer. decide-kit is a typed library that composes constraint-solver with consumer-facing SwiftUI views; the views are themselves typed projections of substrate primitives. Light variant honors the substrate-doctrinal posture; the runnable surface graduates to spawn-runnable-app in decide-app.
violationAcknowledgment: Authored without invoking the canonical spawn-software-workstream prospectively. This packet is the retroactive substrate-doctrinal repair.

spawned.consumerFacingClaim: Domain-agnostic matrix-solver primitives + per-domain seed templates + SwiftUI views that ANY consumer-Mac/iOS shell composes into a decide-app surface.

typedPrimitives: Domain (typed catalog of 4 consumer decision categories)

designTruth.designTruthShape: narrative — derived from constraint-solver's recursion fixture but specialized for the consumer-facing layer
designTruth.consumerFirstClaim: Three views compose without xcodeproj. SwiftPM Mac app target (decide-app) is the runnable shell; iOS / Catalyst shells would compose differently without library changes — substrate-doctrinal one-truth-many-lenses.
designTruth.domainAgnosticClaim: Nothing in the library references a specific domain. Adding a new Domain case (laptop / apartment / job / restaurant / ANY future case) is a typed enum extension + a new DomainTemplate inventory; library API surface unchanged.

maintenanceHandoff.primaryConsumer: decide-app (runnable shell) + future iOS / Catalyst shells
maintenanceHandoff.supersessionPolicy: Same as constraint-solver — additive evolution; breaking changes require versioned package.

monitoringPosture: omitted-per-spawn-typed-primitive-light-variant — view-level regressions surface via downstream decide-app compilation + DecideKitTests
